Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 235 upvotes, 28 comments
  2. Agents of Chaos 122 upvotes, 16 comments
  3. OpenGridWorks: The Electricity Infrasctructure, Mapped 130 upvotes, 18 comments
  4. Oscar Reutersvärd (2021) 44 upvotes, 4 comments
  5. 30 Years Ago, Robots Learned to Walk Without Falling 15 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. What major works of literature were written after age of 85? 75? 65? 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  7. Do your own writing 605 upvotes, 198 comments
  8. How to turn anything into a router 698 upvotes, 245 comments
  9. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1028 upvotes, 372 comments
  10. Good CTE, Bad CTE 76 upvotes, 19 comments
  11. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 586 upvotes, 213 comments
  12. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 347 upvotes, 126 comments
  13. 7,655 Ransomware Claims in One Year: Group, Sector, and Country Breakdown 30 upvotes, 6 comments
  14. Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context 163 upvotes, 69 comments
  15. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 358 upvotes, 171 comments
  16. CodingFont: A game to help you pick a coding font 435 upvotes, 219 comments
  17. We're Pausing Asimov Press 48 upvotes, 17 comments
  18. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 343 upvotes, 175 comments
  19. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 432 upvotes, 227 comments
  20. Artemis II is not safe to fly 438 upvotes, 268 comments
  21. GitHub backs down, kills Copilot pull-request ads after backlash 316 upvotes, 197 comments
  22. Bird brains (2023) 325 upvotes, 204 comments
  23. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 36 upvotes, 15 comments
  24. Vulnerability research is cooked 199 upvotes, 139 comments
  25. Show HN: Pardus Browser- a browser for AI agents without Chromium 6 upvotes, 1 comments
  26. Android Developer Verification 284 upvotes, 280 comments
  27. I'm betting on ATProto 129 upvotes, 117 comments
  28. One of the largest salt mines in the world exists under Lake Erie 41 upvotes, 30 comments
  29. U.S. stocks are set to deliver their worst quarter in nearly four years 12 upvotes, 8 comments
  30. RamAIn (YC W26) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments
